name: Magistral Small
archDisplay: Dense transformer (24B), reasoning fine-tune of Mistral Small 3.1 with cold-start data distilled from Magistral Medium
note: Mistral's first open-weights reasoning model (Apache 2.0); transparent multilingual chain-of-thought, fits a single RTX 4090 or 32GB Mac once quantized.
tpsNote: Vendor states it fits and runs on a single RTX 4090 once quantized; no independently measured tok/s figure found
